title: bulbophyllum maskeliyense
intro: Bulbophyllum maskeliyense is a rare and endangered orchid species native to Sri Lanka. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including relief from fever, sore throat, and skin conditions, due to its bioactive compounds. Herbal preparations of Bulbophyllum maskeliyense can be made into teas or infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
